source.module: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

topicTags: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

content.problemStatement:
In this worked out example, we will create a simple Weather Display App using Django templates and conditionals.

### How does this code work?
The given code displays a weather icon and message based on the current weather condition (like Sunny, Rainy, etc.). It also gives a helpful message based on how hot or cold the temperature is.

**Note:** Unlike Python - `{% endif %}` is necessarily required in HTML template to close the if statement block.

Go ahead and change the temperature and weather conditions in the dictionary - `weather_data` - in `views.py` to see the HTML rendered based on the conditional statements. \
You can check out the webpage at `/weather/`.
